productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Woven Black Tie
description: Luxurious black silk tie with a unique floral design woven into the fabric, from united colors of benetton, perfect for those occasions when only the very best will do. Wear it to brighten up a formal suit when you're trying to impress an important client, or your future Mother-in-law! Length: 148 cm Made of 100% silk for luxurious feel and light sheen Has a checked design Loop with brand badge on the inner Tie care Dry clean only
